meaning: n.盘子,金属板,图版,金银餐具vt.镀(金,银等),电镀,给...装钢板
examples: She heaped my plate with food.
She heaped food on my plate.
Try the garlic and chilli prawns cooked a la plancha (grilled on a metal plate).
Instead of tollbooths London is using digital cameras that snap license plate photos as vehicles pass underneath.
